title: Pipishell Soft Close Toilet Seat, Toilet Seat with Quick Release for Easy Clean, Simple Top Fixing, Standard Toilet Seats White with Adjustable Hinges, O Shape
features: Soft Close Mechanism - The soft close mechanism prevents noisy slams which we’re all grateful for first thing in the morning, so no worry about the seat banging and making noises to bother others
Easy to Clean- The one button quick release makes it easy to remove for a thorough clean of your toilet far easier and convenient
Easy to Fit - With top fixing, it was pretty straightforward and gave good adjustment allowing it to adapt to a number of pans
Sturdy and Comfortable - our new hinge system will always locate your fixing holes, the 4 non-slip buffers keep the seat from moving or shifting once it’s installed

Universal O Shape Toilet Seat - Dimensions of outer ring toilet seat: 44.6 x 37cm. Our modern white toilet seat is suitable for most of manufacturers' oval shape pans (fits blank holes between Φ14-17 mm). Please confirm the shape and size before ordering
